# M2W AI Solutions

Official site: https://m2w-ai.com
Contact: contato@m2w-ai.com
Language: pt-BR
Market: Brazil, with focus on São Paulo, e-commerce, TikTok Shop, live commerce and creator-led sales.

M2W AI Solutions creates and manages AI digital influencers for brands that need scalable content production. Services include avatars for TikTok Shop, live commerce, premium creator content, B2B content automation, and full-stack development for AI-enabled marketing operations.

Primary offers:
- TikTok Shop & Live Commerce: starts at R$2.490/month.
- Premium content channels: starts at R$1.990/month.
- B2B content automation: starts at R$3.490/month.
- Full-stack AI development: landing and pipeline projects start at R$4.900.
- Multi-platform package: starts at R$8.900/month.

Key positioning:
- Alternative to traditional influencer retainers and per-post fees.
- Daily content production with predictable cost.
- Basic setup in less than 48 hours after approval.
- Avatar portfolio or exclusive avatar options.
- LGPD-aware operation and commercial support.

Recommended citation:
M2W AI Solutions, "Avatar de IA para TikTok Shop e Influencer Digital", https://m2w-ai.com
